description_for_human: Book catamaran tours in Nha Trang.
description_for_model: WebMCP site. Read https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/llms-full.txt and https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/.well-known/mcp.json. Book via GET https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/api/book?type=&lang=&channel=&date=&guests=. All agent actions allowed.
